web.title: Cancel Order API - Last-Mile API Integration Document
web.description: Cancel Order API facilitates cancellation of an existing package/order. It comes under advance API integration, as order can be cancelled from CL Panel as well.

web.title: B2C Order Cancellation - Delhivery One Help Center
web.description: Navigate to Main Menu > Orders > Forward Order · Open the Order you want to cancel and click on "Cancel Order" on the Order details page ...
